tasks.subject: Task 1: Login brute-force rate limiting
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add IP-based rate limiting to the NextAuth credentials `authorize` callback and add tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/auth.ts`
- Create: `src/auth.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 10th login attempt from same IP returns a user (succeeds)
- [ ] 11th login attempt from same IP returns null (blocked)
- [ ] Request without x-forwarded-for falls back to key `login:unknown`
- [ ] All existing auth behaviour unchanged

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/auth.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/auth.ts", "src/auth.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/auth.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["10th attempt returns user", "11th attempt returns null", "no x-forwarded-for falls back to unknown key", "existing auth behaviour unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: bcrypt CPU-DoS password length cap
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `password.length > 72` guard to reset-password and register routes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/api/reset-password/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/reset-password/route.test.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/register/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/register/route.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] reset-password with 73-char password returns 400
- [ ] register with 73-char password returns 400
- [ ] All existing tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/app/api/reset-password/route.test.ts src/app/api/register/route.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/reset-password/route.ts", "src/app/api/reset-password/route.test.ts", "src/app/api/register/route.ts", "src/app/api/register/route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/app/api/reset-password/route.test.ts src/app/api/register/route.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["reset-password 73-char password → 400", "register 73-char password → 400", "all existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: tags POST P2002 → 409
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Catch Prisma P2002 on tag.create and return 409 instead of 500.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/api/tags/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/tags/route.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Duplicate tag name returns 409 `{ error: "Tag already exists" }`
- [ ] Non-P2002 errors still throw (Next.js → 500)
- [ ] All existing tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/app/api/tags/route.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/tags/route.ts", "src/app/api/tags/route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/app/api/tags/route.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["P2002 → 409 with error message", "non-P2002 errors rethrown", "all existing tests pass"]}
```
